title: The Allies Hold the Plateau
description: Pages 14–18 focus on the allies hold the plateau, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as pica's giant stone body threatens the plateau, and Zoro prepares to cut through Dressrosa itself.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The day you just up and dis- appeared...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: his fever suddenly rose... I took him to the hospital, but...

dialogue.speaker: Sai
dialogue.text: They said they've never seen anyone like you, much less an employee!

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: What is it that you even do!? Where did you get the money we have!? How can you even call yourself a father!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Quit making a fool of me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Wait! Lucy Anne! It's still pouring out there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Don't you dare try and follow me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Wait, Lucy Anne! The reason I didn't tell you everything...

dialogue.speaker: Baby 5
dialogue.text: The earth and sand from that landslide fell right on top of your wife, trapping her underneath...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Her condition is, unfortunately, quite grave...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: I want to hear your voice.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Yes. She is unaware of what happens around her.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: I fear she will probably never be able to express emotion outwardly again.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: As for her life, I am unsure of how long it will last...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: If you had never met /me, you'd still...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: "I didn't want to lose you! That's why I never told you the truth!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: I want to hear you re-spond.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: I found Gimlet's Bonnet! Don't I look like him?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: He had my face, remember- beer?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: ...sorry. That wasn't very funny, was it. What if some- one sees me like this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Don't laugh! That man, right after his son died...

dialogue.speaker: Baby 5
dialogue.text: He lost his wife in a terrible accident!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: Damn, that'll suck the sanity right out of a man....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: Make way, everyone! A pervert is coming through! Eww, gross!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: This has much more value than...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: Because when I wear these clothes,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: I can get you to smile for me!

summary: The Allies Hold the Plateau advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
